referencedTypes.name: MouseEvent
referencedTypes.description:
The **`MouseEvent`** interface represents events that occur due to the user interacting with a pointing device (such as a mouse). Common events using this interface include click, dblclick, mouseup, mousedown.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/MouseEvent)

members.name: to
members.description: Route Location the link should navigate to when clicked on.

referencedTypes.name: RouteLocationRaw
referencedTypes.description: Route location that can be passed to `router.push()` and other user-facing APIs.
typeParameters: Name extends keyof RouteMap = keyof RouteMap

members.name: replace
members.description: Calls `router.replace` instead of `router.push`.

members.name: href
members.description: The URL the link should navigate to when clicked on.

members.name: activeClass
members.description: Class to apply when the link is active

members.name: exactActiveClass
members.description: Class to apply when the link is exact active

members.name: inactiveClass
members.description: The class to apply to the link when it is inactive.

members.name: prefetchedClass
members.description: A class to apply to links that have been prefetched.

members.name: external
members.description: Forces the link to be considered as external (true) or internal (false). This is helpful to handle edge-cases

members.name: ariaCurrentValue
members.description: Value passed to the attribute `aria-current` when the link is exact active.

members.name: viewTransition
members.description: Pass the returned promise of `router.push()` to `document.startViewTransition()` if supported.

members.name: target
members.description: Where to display the linked URL, as the name for a browsing context.

members.name: rel
members.description: A rel attribute value to apply on the link. Defaults to "noopener noreferrer" for external links.

members.name: noRel
members.description: If set to true, no rel attribute will be added to the link

members.name: prefetch
members.description: When enabled will prefetch middleware, layouts and payloads of links in the viewport.

members.name: prefetchOn
members.description: Allows controlling when to prefetch links. By default, prefetch is triggered only on visibility.

members.name: noPrefetch
members.description: Escape hatch to disable `prefetch` attribute.

members.name: trailingSlash
members.description:
An option to either add or remove trailing slashes in the `href` for this specific link.
Overrides the global `trailingSlash` option if provided.

props.name: ButtonLoadingProps
props.resolvedType: { loading?: boolean; loadingText?: string; loadingDuration?: number; autoLoading?: boolean; loadingIcon?: string; loadingIconProps?: Partial<IconProps>; loadingPosition?: Align; class?: string | Record<string, boolean> | ClassValue[] | null; color?: ThemeColor; size?: ThemeSize; variant?: ButtonVariant; shape?: ButtonShape; shadow?: ButtonShadow; fitContent?: boolean; type?: ButtonType; disabled?: boolean; asChild?: boolean; as?: AsTag | Component }

members.name: loading
members.description: Whether the button is loading.

members.name: loadingText
members.description:
The text to display when the button is loading.

It will be displayed when the loading position is center.

members.name: loadingDuration
members.description: The duration of the loading state in milliseconds.

members.name: autoLoading
members.description:
Whether to automatically handle loading state during click event. When true, the button will show loading state
during click event execution. When false, you need to manually control the loading state.

members.name: loadingIcon
members.description: The icon name of iconify to display when the button is loading.

members.name: loadingIconProps
members.description: The props of the loading icon.

members.name: loadingPosition
members.description: The position of the loading icon.
